description:
From the "One Day - 1 Problem" series.

(Thanks to Spirit, BartTM and zinger for the help!)

(;B[cs]C[Well done! ;)RIGHT])
(;B[as]C[Black can live by playing c1 instead.  As White has an extra big ko-threat and the chances of winning the ko (and thereby gaining an extra point.) are negligible, strictly speaking this move is inferior to c1.RIGHT]))
(;B[cs];W[aq]C[Black's dead!]))
(;W[aq];B[bs]C[And black'd live.. ;)RIGHT]))
